The total Beneficiary payments are calculated as the sum of LINE_COINSRNC_AMT + 
LINE_BENE_PTB_DDCTBL_AMT for the relevant lines. 

Claims for other carrier/DME claim lines are a subset of the claims in the Part B carrier and DME data 
files. Types of services which may have been summarized in this other carrier category (OTHC) include 
ambulance, chiropractor, chemotherapy, vision, hearing, and speech services, etc. 

SHORT NAME: — 

LONG NAME: OTHC_BENE_PMT
